scripts.preinstall: corepack prepare pnpm@9 --activate && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const f of ['package-lock.json','yarn.lock']) { try { fs.rmSync(f,{force:true}); } catch(e) {} }"
scripts.build: node -e "const { execSync } = require('child_process'); if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production') { execSync('corepack pnpm run typecheck', { stdio: 'inherit' }); } execSync('corepack pnpm -r --if-present run build', { stdio: 'inherit' });"
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm run typecheck:libs && corepack pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
